description:
Create custom dice with text and SVG faces. Use chance in new and unusual ways.
• Choose from d2 to d20 sized dice: easily alter # of sides / clone
• Personalise dice faces: add text and / or a SVG image to any side
• Essential roll logic: multipliers, exploding dice, and score adjustment
• Roll multiple dice: combine different dice and only display the information you want to see
• Quick Yes / No shortcut: get an instant answer for a fast decision
• Example dice included: d6; Hexagram; Mr Benn; The Dice Man
• Import & Export: save, share, and reuse everything

• User feedback drives development and is always appreciated!
